summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No merge, fix, raise-PR, close, or public GitHub mutation is planned. The open PRs remain open because each either needs proof, product/maintainer judgment, unresolved bot-review work, or central security handling on a linked item.

Keep open as related to the centrally routed #49523 issue; unresolved P1 review feedback and failing proof block stronger action.
Central OpenClaw security triage must own this issue; unrelated non-security PR classifications continue separately.
Recorded as security-sensitive closed context; no action is needed while classifying the open non-security PRs.
